text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ever since my last loss, not a night has gone by
where my dreams haven't been plagued by its
specter.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But that nightmare draws to a close today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've tempered my body with intense training so
that I never again have to experience the taste of
bitter defeat.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Of course. The Empress will be vanquished no
more!
